meta.title: Join Us In Building This Small Workshop
meta.description: A practical first step to restart traditional Khatam craft through a small workshop space, essential tools, and steady hands.

hero.title: Join Us In Building This Small Workshop
hero.subtitle: I can begin creating, teaching, and sharing traditional craftsmanship with just a small space and a few basic tools.
hero.emotionalLine: This is not a finished workshop yet — it’s the beginning of one.
